Title: Owner, CEO
Company Location: 34-05 44th Street, New York, 11101, United States
Company Description:
Hey! Welcome to Blitz Medical. 
We help medical practices and healthcare organizations achieve their most ambitious business goals, by providing patient acquisition and patient retention focused digital marketing strategies.
Whether you're a small practice that is looking to build its presence in your community, a medium sized facility that seeks to keep growing, or a large organization focused on maintaining your position, digital marketing is a powerful, controllable medium for achieving your practice's business goals.
With the right campaign, we can attract brand new patients to your office, attract particular cases, and nurture your current patient base in order to drive more appointments and internal referrals.
What makes us our marketing agency different from the hundreds of others, is our focus on helping medical practices succeed. We are passionate about working with doctors, because our team shares many of the qualities which physicians do: compassion, diligence, and scientific-mindedness.
As a small marketing agency, our team's scientific approach is laser-focused on maximum effectiveness and efficiency. We are constantly improving conversion rates, making best use of advertising dollars, and experimenting with new strategies. 
Above all, the highest satisfaction for us is witnessing the transformation from an empty, quiet waiting room to a bustling, lively one. Once this has been achieved, we know that we have made real change somewhere, and have formed a lifelong partnership with a healthcare provider team.
If you also want to experience sustained growth in your practice, generate more new patients, attract your most desirable cases, then we would love to work with you.
Website: https://blitzmedical.com
Email: info@blitzmedical.com

Title: Partner & CIO
Company Location: 6735 Salt Cedar Way Suite 120, Frisco, TX 75034, United States
Company Description:
NewportMed is the leading medical billing & consulting services company for surgeons, specialty groups, and surgery centers.

We are committed to improving the financial health of the practices we serve. We focus on specialty practices and collaborate with our clients to save time and money so they can do what they do best: providing the highest quality of care with the best possible outcomes. 

Our offerings include secure and HIPAA compliant cloud services to the latest in revenue cycle management and comprehensive ICD-10 training. Our team will be there every step of the way to ensure your practice has the resources needed to operate optimally. 

OUR PARTNERS: 
Known as an industry leader for specialty healthcare management solutions, NewportMed calls Southern California home and is headquartered in the City of Orange. We have strategically partnered with third party companies that share our vision. Our integrated third party solutions are driven by results to our specialty practices. We bring all the benefits of the best processes and information technology platforms without trying to push clients into becoming software experts.

ALWAYS REFINING: 
Because the goal is to increase client revenue and decrease wasteful processes, we never stop refining and improving operations, products and services. The latest technology and proprietary processes are used to insure all charges are captured, documented, submitted and paid. We rank in the top 5% in all of the most important MGMA benchmarks, we continue to make strides in the areas of accuracy, turnaround time and revenue maximization. We believe in doing it right the first time. 

SIMPLIFYING THE COMPLICATED:
Though our service is comprehensive and sophisticated, NewportMed makes it’s offering simple: We are physician advocates and want to be the last company you ever need to talk to. Our aspiration is to be your partner for the life of your practice.

Title: Co-Founder and CIO
Company Location: 11172 Dorchester Lane, Frisco, TX 75033, United States
Company Description:
Viewgol is a specialized healthcare revenue cycle management (RCM) company offering advanced data analytics, advisory RCM services, and business intelligence solutions. It tackles revenue cycle issues for healthcare organizations, such as inefficiencies in EHR/PM system reporting, gaps in practices’ revenue cycle, and data silos for multi-practice groups. 
With its enterprise-level analytics tool, Viewgol Analytics, and a team of BI, payer science, and RCM experts, Viewgol transforms these challenges into opportunities for operational excellence and revenue growth. 
The business intelligence team utilizes Viewgol Analytics to uncover hidden insights in the revenue cycle, optimizing profit and efficiency. Meanwhile, the payer science team, analyzes payer behavior, patterns, and trends to o facilitate more effective relationships between healthcare practices and payers. 
As a result, healthcare organizations find themselves better equipped to manage their revenue cycles, freeing up more time and resources to focus on delivering excellent patient care.

Company Description: Board-certified Frisco, TX urogynecologist, Dr. Aimee Nguyen, specializes in pelvic floor reconstructive surgery, urogynecology, and vaginal reconstructive surgery. She is dedicated to improving the function and appearance of the vagina and all aspects of the female genitalia so that women can live a full and active life. Dr. Nguyen performs procedures to correct and treat an overactive bladder, urinary incontinence, pelvic organ prolapse and recurrent urinary tract or vaginal infections. She is also a cosmetic and reconstructive vaginal surgeon specializing in surgeries such as labiaplasty, hymenoplasty and vaginoplasty.
